title: PROJECT SENTINEL
subtitle: Institutional Geopolitical Intelligence Dashboard

bluf.label: HORMUZ STORAGE CONSTRAINTS GOVERNING TIMELINE
bluf.text: The US-Iran confrontation has entered a critical phase where physical storage constraints, not diplomatic rhetoric, now govern the decision timeline. Tehran has roughly 12–22 days of onshore storage remaining before forced production shut-ins cause irreversible reservoir damage. Strategic advantage: United States (80–93% probability).

key_judgments.text: Iran faces forced crude production shut-ins within 15–30 days
US-Iran diplomatic track effectively stalled for the next 30 days
UAE exit from OPEC+ marks a structural realignment of global oil governance
Russia military intervention in Iran theater remains unlikely
European energy markets will face acute jet fuel shortages within 3–6 weeks
Strategic trajectory of European far-right resurgence remains uncertain
Somali piracy re-emerging as significant threat to Indian Ocean shipping

sections.title: Operation Epic Fury — Maritime Blockade
sections.body: The US-Israeli campaign has transitioned from high-intensity strikes to a maritime blockade strategy. 42 vessels turned back from the Strait of Hormuz. 200 aircraft and 25 ships now involved in blockade enforcement. Ceasefire holding on an open-ended basis but no diplomatic off-ramp defined.

sections.title: Energy & Economic Disruption
sections.body: Strait of Hormuz closure continues to impact global energy markets with no timeline for reopening under the US-proposed Maritime Freedom Construct.

sections.title: Ukraine — Strategic Adaptation
sections.body: Ukraine has used the Middle East crisis as a strategic window to deepen Gulf security partnerships, including anti-drone deployments and long-term security agreements.

sections.title: Indo-Pacific & China
sections.body: China conducted combat readiness patrols near Scarborough Shoal as US attention remains fixed on the Middle East. Testing US capacity for two-theater engagement.

indicators.label: Taiwan Risk
indicators.value: Biggest point of risk per Wang Yi

horizon_items: Next 24-48h: Ceasefire decision point — Trump briefed on options, decision on renewed kinetic ops likely imminent
Next 7 days: Maritime Freedom Construct diplomatic push; coalition-building for safe passage through Hormuz
Next 30 days: Risk of protracted standoff without diplomatic breakthrough; potential for Iranian asymmetric retaliation in cyber domain
Watch items: IRGC leadership signals, Houthi Red Sea activation, China South China Sea posture during Trump visit
